zh.Bramshall, Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Eng: 英國斯塔福爾武托希特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Stafford於1301年9月24日出生在英國斯塔福爾阿敏頓時，他的父親Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford29歲，母親Margaret Basset21歲。他於大約1331年與Margaret de Audley在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1332年登記服兵役。他於1361年被列為royal envoy to ireland。他去世於1372年8月31日在英國肯特托布利其享年70歲，埋葬在英國肯特托布利其。

zh-hans.Bramshall, Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Eng: 英国斯塔福爾武托希特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Stafford于1301年9月24日出生在英国斯塔福爾阿敏頓时，他的父亲Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford29岁，母亲Margaret Basset21岁。他于大约1331年与Margaret de Audley在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1332年登记服兵役。他于1361年被列为royal envoy to ireland。他去世于1372年8月31日在英国肯特托布利其享年70岁，埋葬在英国肯特托布利其。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Stafford was born on 24 September 1301, in Amington, Staffordshire, England, his father, Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford, was 29 and his mother, Margaret Basset, was 21. He married Margaret de Audley about 1331, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He registered for military service in 1332. In 1361, at the age of 60, his occupation is listed as royal envoy to ireland. He died on 31 August 1372, in Tonbridge, Kent, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Tonbridge, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Stafford est né le 24 septembre 1301, à Amington, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margaret Basset, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Audley environ 1331, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1332. En 1361, à l’âge de 60 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est royal envoy to ireland. Il est décédé le 31 août 1372, à Tonbridge, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Tonbridge, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Stafford am 24. September 1301 in Amington, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford 29 und seine Mutter Margaret Basset 21. Er hat um 1331 in England Margaret de Audley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er hat sich 1332 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1361, als er 60 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als royal envoy to ireland aufgeführt. Er starb am 31. August 1372 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Tonbridge, Kent, England und wurde in Tonbridge, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Stafford è nato il il 24 settembre 1301 nel Amington, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Basset, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Audley circa 1331, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1332. Nel 1361, all'età di 60 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come royal envoy to ireland. Morì il 31 agosto 1372, nel Tonbridge, Kent, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Tonbridge, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Staffordが1301年9月24日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアミントンで生まれた時，父Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Staffordは29歳，母Margaret Bassetは21歳であった。約1331年にイギリスでMargaret de Audleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1332年に兵役登録をした。1361年，60歳の時，職業はroyal envoy to irelandと記録されている。彼は1372年8月31日にイギリスケントトンブリッジで70歳で死去し，イギリスケントトンブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Stafford(이)가 1301년 9월 24일 영국 스태퍼드실르 아밍턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Basset(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1331년 영국에서 Margaret de Audley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1332년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1361년, 60세의 나이로 그의 직업은 royal envoy to ireland이었다. 그는 1372년 8월 31일 영국 켄트 토브리지에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 토브리지에 묻혔다.

mn.24 September 1301–31 August 1372: 1301 оны Есдүгээр сарын 24–1372 оны Наймдугаар сарын 31

pt.24 September 1301–31 August 1372: 24 de setembro de 1301–31 de agosto de 1372
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Stafford nasceu em 24 de setembro de 1301, em Amington, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Basset, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Audley aproximadamente 1331, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1332. Em 1361, com 60 anos, sua profissão aparece como royal envoy to ireland. Ele faleceu em 31 de agosto de 1372, em Tonbridge, Kent, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Tonbridge, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Stafford родился 24 сентября 1301 г. в местности амингтон, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Basset, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Audley около 1331 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. В 1332 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1361 году, в возрасте 60 лет, работал по профессии royal envoy to ireland. Он умер 31 августа 1372 г. в местности тонбридж, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности тонбридж, кэнт, Англия.

es.24 September 1301–31 August 1372: 24 de septiembre de 1301–31 de agosto de 1372
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph Stafford nació el 24 de septiembre de 1301, en Amington, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Stafford 1st Baron Stafford, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margaret Basset, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret de Audley aproximadamente 1331, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1332. En 1361, a la edad de 60 años, su ocupación registrada era royal envoy to ireland. Murió el 31 de agosto de 1372, en Tonbridge, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Tonbridge, Kent, Inglaterra.
